title: Reuters Connect Content Item
description: A content item from the Reuters Connect API representing a piece of editorial content such as a news story, image, video clip, or graphic. Items follow the IPTC NewsML-G2 standard and may be Simple News Items (SNI), News Event Packages (NEP), or Super News Event Packages (SNEP) for composite content.

id.description: The unique identifier for the item, typically in tag URI format (e.g., tag:reuters.com,2025:newsml_L1N3KT0AB:1). Includes the version number as a suffix.

guid.description: A globally unique identifier for the item regardless of version. This identifier remains stable across revisions of the same content.

version.description: The version number of this item revision. Incremented each time the item is updated.

headline.description: The headline or title of the content item. For text stories, this is the story headline. For images and video, this is the caption title.

slug.description: A short keyword slug summarizing the item topic, typically used for internal categorization and routing.

dateCreated.description: The date and time when the item was originally created, in ISO 8601 format.

dateModified.description: The date and time when the item was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

channel.description: The alias of the channel this item belongs to. Channels represent curated feeds of editorial content.

mediaType.description: The media type classification of the content item.

urgency.description: The editorial urgency priority of the item, following the IPTC urgency scale where 1 is the most urgent and 9 is the least urgent.

byline.description: The author or creator attribution for the item. May include the reporter name, photographer name, or agency credit.

dateline.description: The location and date line for the item, typically formatted as CITY, Month Day (e.g., NEW YORK, March 4).

language.description: The ISO 639-1 language code of the content.

body.description: The full text body of the content item. For text items, this contains the story body which may include XHTML markup. For media items, this may contain a caption or extended description.

subjects.description: Subject classification codes assigned to the item, following the IPTC NewsCodes taxonomy for consistent categorization.

renditions.description: Available renditions of the content. For images and video, this includes different sizes, resolutions, and formats available for download.

associations.description: Related items associated with this content, such as images accompanying a text story, video related to an event, or other cross-referenced editorial content.

subject.description: A subject classification code from the IPTC NewsCodes taxonomy.

name.description: The human-readable name of the subject category.

rendition.description: A specific rendition or format of a media item available for download.

name.description: The name or label of the rendition indicating its purpose or size.

href.description: The URL to download this rendition of the content.

mimetype.description: The MIME type of the rendition file.

width.description: The width of the rendition in pixels (for images and video).

height.description: The height of the rendition in pixels (for images and video).

sizeinbytes.description: The file size of the rendition in bytes.

association.description: A reference to an associated content item.

id.description: The unique identifier of the associated item.

type.description: The type of association describing the relationship between items.

headline.description: The headline of the associated item.

mediaType.description: The media type of the associated item.
